creator: danielt@pilgerer.org
text:
On Wed, Oct 18, 2006 at 11:49:58AM +0200, Koopmann, Jan-Peter wrote:
> I just checked this with the author of MailScanner and the fix will be
> in the next MailScanner release anyway. Then there would be no need for
> this patch anymore. I do not mind it being in this port version but we
> woiuld have to take it out of the next version again.

Great!

> Suggestion: Since this is not a FreeBSD specific problem it would have
> been better to contact the MailScanner author himself preferably on the
> MailScanner mailing list. Just a hint. :-)

Well, I didn't know that. I'm not into mailscanner. I was just
the one who debugged the problem, and the fastest way to vent my
anger was typing "send-pr". ;-)

So if the bug is fixed with the next update you can close the pr
now.

Best Regards,
                                        -DaTa
